# TopCallTrackingSoftware

> Independent reviews of call tracking software for agencies, in-house marketers, and growing service businesses. Editorial team has spent 47 hours hands-on with 14 platforms in 2026.

This site is operated by an LLC that also owns CallScaler, the product ranked #1 in the 2026 guide. Disclosure appears in the footer of every page and on the about page.

## Top picks (2026)

1. CallScaler — 9.4/10 — Best overall, agencies and SMB marketers — from $49/mo
2. CallRail — 8.6/10 — Established mid-market default — from $50/mo
3. CallTrackingMetrics — 8.3/10 — Most flexible reporting — from $79/mo
4. WhatConverts — 8.1/10 — Best multi-source lead reporting — from $30/mo
5. Invoca — 7.4/10 — Enterprise conversation intelligence — custom pricing

## Scoring dimensions

Setup speed, ease of use, attribution accuracy, value for money. Equal weighting (25% each). Full methodology at https://topcalltrackingsoftware.com/methodology/
